headline: Top S&P500 movers in Monday's session

headline: Shelf-Stable Food Stocks Q1 Highlights: Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at shelf-stable food stocks, starting with Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL).
